chapter_title.en: Chapter 55 – Inheritance of the child of the adultery (bastard)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/246)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/246)
text: كَتَبَ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا كِتَاباً إِلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام ) مَعِي يَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ فَجَرَ بِامْرَأَةٍ ثُمَّ إِنَّهُ تَزَوَّجَهَا بَعْدَ الْحَمْلِ فَجَاءَتْ بِوَلَدٍ وَ هُوَ أَشْبَهُ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ بِهِ فَكَتَبَ بِخَطِّهِ وَ خَاتَمِهِ الْوَلَدُ لِغَيَّةٍ لَا يُوَرَّثُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Sayf, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Al Ashary who said,

‘One of our companions wrote a letter to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup> along with me, asking him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who was immoral with a woman, then he married her after the pregnancy, so she came with a child, and he resembles him most from the creatures of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> wrote by his<sup>asws</sup> own handwriting and his<sup>asws</sup> seal: ‘The child of sin does not inherit’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn Sayf from Muhammad ibn af-Hassan al-Ash ‘ariy who has narrated the following: “Once certain persons of our people with me wrote to abu Ja’far, al-Thaniy, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, asking about a man who commits the indecent act with a woman, then marries her after she becomes pregnant and gives birth to a child who of all creatures is similar to him. He (the Imam) wrote back in his handwriting the answer that said, ‘A child born out of wedlock cannot be made to inherit.’”
